hooks.command: input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; [ -n "$sid" ] && date +%s > "/tmp/asm-turn-$sid" 2>/dev/null; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=working --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; q=""; if [ -n "$sid" ] && [ -f "/tmp/asm-turn-$sid" ]; then s=$(cat "/tmp/asm-turn-$sid" 2>/dev/null); now=$(date +%s); case "$s" in (*[!0-9]*|"") ;; (*) [ $((now - s)) -lt 180 ] && q=1 ;; esac; fi; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=done --data-urlencode "ai=$name" ${q:+--data-urlencode quiet=1} >/dev/null 2>&1 &)

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; nt=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.notification_type // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ "$nt" = "idle_prompt" ] && exit 0; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=waiting --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; [ -n "$sid" ] && rm -f "/tmp/asm-turn-$sid" 2>/dev/null; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=ended --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)
